v.code: const inbox = ctx.getLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_mgmt_inbox' }); if (!inbox || typeof inbox !== 'object') return; let opId = String(inbox.op_id || ''); const reject = (detail) => { ctx.writeLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_mgmt_error' }, 'json', { op_id: opId, code: 'direct_model_mutation_disabled', detail }); ctx.rmLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_mgmt_inbox' }); ctx.rmLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'run_mbr_mgmt_to_mqtt' }); }; if (inbox.version !== 'v0' || inbox.type !== 'ui_event') { reject('unsupported_bridge_message'); return; } const sourceModelId = Number(inbox.source_model_id); if (sourceModelId !== 100) { reject('unsupported_source_model'); return; } const data = inbox.data && typeof inbox.data === 'object' ? inbox.data : {}; const action = String(inbox.action || data.action || 'unknown'); if (!opId) opId = (data.meta && data.meta.op_id) || ('ui_' + Date.now()); if (!opId) return; const seenKey = 'mbr_seen_' + opId; if (ctx.getLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: seenKey })) { ctx.rmLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_mgmt_inbox' }); ctx.rmLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'run_mbr_mgmt_to_mqtt' }); return; } ctx.writeLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: seenKey }, 'str', '1'); const ts = (typeof inbox.timestamp === 'number' && Number.isFinite(inbox.timestamp)) ? inbox.timestamp : Date.now(); const patch = { version: 'mt.v0', op_id: opId, records: [{ op: 'add_label', model_id: 100, p: 1, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'action', t: 'str', v: action }, { op: 'add_label', model_id: 100, p: 1, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'data', t: 'json', v: data }, { op: 'add_label', model_id: 100, p: 1, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'timestamp', t: 'int', v: ts }] }; const base = String(ctx.getLabel({ model_id: 0, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mqtt_topic_base' }) || ''); const topic = base ? (base + '/100/event') : ''; if (!topic) { reject('missing_mqtt_topic_base'); return; } ctx.publishMqtt(topic, patch); ctx.rmLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_mgmt_inbox' }); ctx.rmLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'run_mbr_mgmt_to_mqtt' });

const inbox = ctx.getLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_mqtt_inbox' }); if (!inbox || typeof inbox !== 'object') return; const payload = inbox.payload; if (!payload || typeof payload !== 'object') return; const patch = payload; if (!patch || patch.version !== 'mt.v0' || !Array.isArray(patch.records)) return; const opId = String(patch.op_id || ''); if (!opId) return; const seenKey = 'mbr_seen_' + opId; if (!ctx.getLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: seenKey })) { ctx.writeLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: seenKey }, 'str', '1'); } const mgmtEvent = { version: 'v0', type: 'snapshot_delta', op_id: opId, payload: patch }; ctx.writeLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'change_out' }, 'MGMT_OUT', mgmtEvent); ctx.rmLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_mqtt_inbox' }); ctx.rmLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'run_mbr_mqtt_to_mgmt' });

const event = { version: 'v0', type: 'mbr_ready', op_id: 'mbr_heartbeat_' + Date.now(), timestamp: Date.now() }; ctx.writeLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_heartbeat_out' }, 'MGMT_OUT', event);

const event = { version: 'v0', type: 'mbr_ready', op_id: 'mbr_ready_' + Date.now(), timestamp: Date.now() }; ctx.writeLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_ready_out' }, 'MGMT_OUT', event);
